sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61612" key="laqro/bolos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λαθρό-βολος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n61612.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">secretly set</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δόναξ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.824</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eryc.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
